description_long: This object is a rectangular, box-shaped shrub with dense, vibrant green foliage covering all visible surfaces. The leaves are small, closely packed, and create a uniform, lush texture reminiscent of a manicured hedge. The shrub appears to be pruned into a geometric form, suggesting it is used for decorative or boundary purposes in urban landscapes. The surface is entirely covered in foliage, with no visible branches or flowers, giving it a seamless, leafy appearance. Its size and shape make it suitable for use as a divider or border along sidewalks, parks, or building entrances. The overall impression is of a well-maintained, ornamental shrub designed for structured landscaping.
description: A dense, rectangular shrub with vibrant green, closely packed leaves, pruned into a geometric box shape. Ideal for use as a decorative hedge or urban landscape divider.
description_view_0: End view showing the narrow, vertical face densely covered in small green leaves.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long, rectangular expanse of lush, uniform foliage.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, similar to view 0, with a vertical face of tightly packed green leaves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with a broad, leafy surface.
